-%0A%09%7D%0A%09return node%0A%7D%0Afunc BstInsert(values %5B%5Dint) *Node %7B%0A%09var root *Node%0A%09for _, v := range values %7B%0A%09%09root = insert(root, v)%0A%09%7D%0A%09return root%0A%7D%0A%0A// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------%0Afunc BShow(node *Node, history string) %7B%0A%09if node != nil && (node.Left != nil %7C%7C node.Right != nil) %7B%0A%09%09BShow(node.Left, history+%22l%22)%0A%09%7D%0A%09for i := 0; i %3C len(history)-1; i++ %7B%0A%09%09if history%5Bi%5D != history%5Bi+1%5D %7B%0A%09%09%09fmt.Print(%22%E2%94%82   %22)%0A%09%09%7D else %7B%0A%09%09%09fmt.Print(%22    %22)%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%7D%0A%09if history != %22%22 %7B%0A%09%09if history%5Blen(history)-1%5D == 'l' %7B%0A%09%09%09fmt.Print(%22%E2%95%AD%E2%94%80%E2%94%80%E2%94%80%22)%0A%09%09%7D else %7B%0A%09%09%09fmt.Print(%22%E2%95%B0%E2%94%80%E2%94%80%E2%94%80%22)%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%7D%0A%09if node == nil %7B%0A%09%09fmt.Println(%22#%22)%0A%09%09return%0A%09%7D%0A%09fmt.Println(node.Value)%0A%09if node.Left != nil %7C%7C node.Right != nil %7B%0A%09%09BShow(node.Right, history+%22r%22)%0A%09%7D%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc main() %7B%0A%09scanner := bufio.NewScanner(os.Stdin)%0A%09scanner.Scan()%0A%09parts := strings.Split(scanner.Text(), %22 %22)%0A%09values := make(%5B%5Dint, 0, len(parts))%0A%09for _, elem := range parts %7B%0A%09%09v, err := strconv.Atoi(elem)%0A%09%09if err == nil %7B%0A%09%09%09values = append(values, v)%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%7D%0A%09root := BstInsert(values)%0A%09BShow(root, %22%22) // Chama a fun%C3%A7%C3%A3o de impress%C3%A3o formatada%0A%7D
